_comment: Company dataset catalog. Managed by storage.catalog.CatalogManager. Do not edit manually.

company_master_bse.description: BSE scrip master — all listed companies on Bombay Stock Exchange
company_master_bse.notes: Monthly refresh recommended. ~5000 active listings. Implemented in Task 2.

company_master_nse.description: NSE equity symbols master — all listed companies on National Stock Exchange
company_master_nse.notes: Monthly refresh recommended. Implemented in Task 2.

company_master_unified.description: Deduplicated and enriched company master combining BSE and NSE records, keyed by ISIN
company_master_unified.notes: Primary reference used by all downstream modules. Derived from BSE + NSE masters. Implemented in Task 2.
